transcript: Hello everybody. Uh, thanks for having me here. Uh, yeah. I... my name is Benedict. Um, I spent the past five years working in in quantitative trading. Um, and today I'm here to announce Meridian. Um, I've spent the past week at this conference talking to the core devs, talking to everybody about how Solana is really bringing liquidity to markets in a much deeper way than we've seen before. So I think Solana is slowly becoming the home for like, um, five trillion dollars of assets to be invested. Um, Meridian... sorry. Um, Meridian is a new type of investing interface for Solana, um, that is much smarter than anything we've seen before. So we spent a lot of time reviewing all of the consumer interfaces, um, in investing, and the thing that we've seen consistently is that interfaces for investing are extremely confusing. Um, the first thing that we built with Meridian is the easiest possible onboarding experience. So we spend 30, 40% of our time reviewing all sorts of onboarding experiences for wallets all over the ecosystem. Um, and the thing that we found is traditional crypto investing platforms have really bad onboarding experiences. Um, they will send you a wallet address, you have to transfer USDC. Um, this whole process is not very intuitive. Um, the thing that real consumers need in this market is debit card onramp, credit card onramp, um, and ACH transfer for larger balances. Um, the next piece that we found is natural language is really kind of sweeping the entire consumer interface landscape. So ChatGPT, um, has kind of changed the entire paradigm for how people use investing products or use consumer products in general. Um, you show up to the ChatGPT app, you type in what you want to see, um, and you get kind of a smart and intuitive, um, answer. So we thought we can bring this idea to consumer finance products. Um, the beginning of this is essentially just text to trade. So you can type in 'buy five dollars of Bitcoin', um, and the app will figure out how to do this and take these actions, use its tools, uh, and execute for you. Um, you can type in things as complicated as 'I want to DCA into Bitcoin'. Um, the app will learn essentially how to build the parameters for this, um, it will go and execute this, um, and then it will ask you clarifying questions, um, and complete a DCA for you. Um, the agent is deeply DeFi native. So when you use ChatGPT, um, you have this question of like, hey, does this app really understand crypto? Um, and and and the solution that we found to this problem is we run an agent 24/7, um, that is essentially scraping Twitter, scraping all the data on the blockchains, putting it in an organized format, building connectors into our interface. Um, and this entire setup allows the agent to be substantially more DeFi native, um, than it's ever been in the past. So you can ask it questions like, 'what's the deal with, um, the Trump asset?', 'what's the deal with the WETH asset?' All of these things will have consistent answers, um, that are well researched and understood just the way that you would understand them on Twitter. Um, and then this is my favorite part of the product. The... we we we looked at how consumer apps deliver, um, their kind of initial screens to you. So when you open up Phantom or you open up Coinbase or you open up Robinhood, what you see is you see a wallet page. Um, the wallet page, it it doesn't have much information for you about like what's happened since you were gone, um, how your portfolio is performing. Um, it doesn't have much information about like what you really would care about. Um, so what we did is we spent a lot of time building essentially an intelligent portfolio insight tool. So so this tool, when you open up the app, it will grab all the information that is necessary and it will deliver you kind of some personalized insight about what's been happening in the market since you were gone. Um, intelligent interfaces for all types of applications are inevitable. So we've seen Cursor take over coding, we've seen, um, Open Evidence take over, um, how people interact with doctors, we've seen ChatGPT take over how people interact with web search. Um, and these types of interfaces are going to take over all sorts of consumer parts of our life. So Mer... Meridian is kind of the bet on how this will take over crypto. Um, yeah. I'm I'm I'm excited to announce that Meridian is now available in beta on the App Store. Uh, you you can download it today. Uh, this is like a deeply different experience than anything you've ever tried before. Um, so so so please give it a try. Um, and yeah, we we think this is kind of where all consumer interfaces are heading for finance. Thank you.

# MetaMask Announces Free Solana ID Minting for Users Before Breakpoint 2025
MetaMask is offering free Solana ID minting until December 22, unlocking exclusive Solana ecosystem perks for users.
![Kelvin Munene](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/d4ea74978aea7ee299447dc24a59aa1dac1fdc2a31a46fbf19da2cdce3d322bd?s=32&r=g)By[Kelvin Munene](https://coincentral.com/author/kelvin/)December 8, 2025**4 Mins Read
![](https://coincentral.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/08/metamask-1.png "MetaMask Announces Free Solana ID Minting for Users Before Breakpoint 2025")
## TLDR
* MetaMask users can mint a Solana ID for free until December 22, 2025.
* The initiative provides users access to perks like staking boosts and rewards.
* Solana partners like Orca and Sanctum offer exclusive benefits for Solana ID holders.
* The program aims to increase wallet adoption and engagement in Solana apps.
MetaMaskhas announced a new initiative that offers users the chance to mint a free Solana ID. This special promotion is available until December 22, 2025. The move is part of a broader partnership between MetaMask and Solana Identity, ahead of Solana’s annual developer conference, Breakpoint 2025. This initiative is designed to encourage users to engage more with Solana’s ecosystem and to provide them with exclusive benefits.
**Mint a Solana ID to Unlock Exclusive Ecosystem Perks**
By minting a Solana ID using MetaMask,[users](https://x.com/MetaMask/status/1998060127950409942?s=20)can unlock various perks across the Solana blockchain ecosystem. These include rewards like staking boosts, exclusive swaps, and access to discounts. Additionally, users will be eligible to participate in raffles and earn rewards from several key partners within the Solana network. Notable Solana-based platforms involved in the program include Orca, SNS, Sanctum, Cudis, and Play Solana.
MetaMask users will not only gain access to these platform-specific rewards but will also be able to explore further opportunities within the Solana ecosystem. These perks are meant to deepen user engagement and increase wallet adoption among MetaMask users who are interacting with Solana applications.
**How the Solana ID Minting Works**
Minting a Solana ID via MetaMask is straightforward. Users simply need to connect their[MetaMask](https://coincentral.com/metamask-introduces-musd-to-simplify-crypto-payments-and-defi-access/)wallet to the Solana Identity platform and follow the steps to mint their Solana ID. The process is free, and users will retain the ID throughout their interactions with Solana-based services. Once minted, the Solana ID will be linked to the user’s MetaMask wallet, allowing them to access the various ecosystem benefits.
The initiative aims to bring together the strengths of MetaMask’s popular walle

sources.title: Onchain x LI.FI: Solana Breakpoint Campaign
sources.snippet:
Get Started on Onchain Wallet

[Download Now](https://crypto.com/en/onchain)

[EVENTS](https://crypto.com/en/events) \|2D AGO

# Onchain x LI.FI: Solana Breakpoint Campaign

Win USDC rewards or exclusive Onchain merch

10 - 17 DEC, 2025UTC

To mark Solana Breakpoint 2025, Crypto.com Onchain has partnered with Li.Fi for a special week-long campaign featuring an in-person giveaway and a Solana on-chain trading challenge.

Whether you're attending Breakpoint in Abu Dhabi or participating online, there’s something for everyone! Complete two simple activities to claim exclusive merchandise or trade using Onchain to win from a 2,000 USDC prize pool.

**CAMPAIGN-SPECIFIC TERMS:**

**Campaign Period**

- **Activity 1: Meet & Selfie Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 13 December 2025, 23:59 UTC
- **Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge:** 10 December 2025, 00:00 UTC to 16 December 2025, 23:59 UTC

**Activity 1. Meet & Selfie (@Breakpoint)**

Join us at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi! Meet the Onchain or Li.Fi team, complete a simple trade, and walk away with exclusive merchandise.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Find an Onchain Wallet or LI.FI team member at Breakpoint,
- Take a selfie with them,
- Post the selfie publicly on X (formerly Twitter),
 - Tag: @onchain\_wallet and @lifiprotocol
 - Include hashtag: #LIFIOnchain
- Download and open the Crypto.com Onchain Wallet, and
- Complete a trade using LI.FI in the Crypto Onchain Wallet app
 - Any chain, any amount, cross-chain or same-chain

**Reward**

- Choose from Onchain-branded swag (“Merch Reward”).
- Available to the first 40 verified and eligible users during the Campaign Period of the Activity 1.
- Merch Reward must be claimed on-site after staff confirmation.
- Limit of one Merch reward per user per day.

**Activity 2: Solana Trading Challenge**

Trade using Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI integration with Solana as part of the route. The top three traders by volume during the campaign will win USDC rewards.

**How to Participate**

_If you wish to participate in the campaign, you may consider completing the following actions:_

- Use Onchain Wallet’s LI.FI-powered swap feature
- Trade involving Solana
 - Examples: ETH to SOL, SOL to USDC, USDC on Solana
- No minimum amount required
- Only trades completed using LI.FI inside the Onchain Wallet will count
- All trades must be performed on Onchain Wallet within the Campaign Period of the Activity 2.

**Rewards**

- **1st Place:** 1,000 USDC
- **2nd Place:** 500 USDC
- **3rd Place:** 250 USDC
- **4th Place:** 150 USDC
- **5th place:** 100 USDC

Winners will be announced within 7 days after the Campaign Period of the Activity 2 ends. Rewards will be sent directly to the eligible wallet addresses on Solana within 7 days after the winner announcement of Activity 2.

**Eligibility and Rules**

- No signup required. Wallet activity and public posts are used to determine eligibility
- All actions must take place within the campaign windows listed above
- Each user is only eligible for one reward per track per day
- Suspicious activity such as wash trading or duplicate wallets will lead to disqualification
- In case of a tie in trading volume, the user who reached that volume first will win
- Onchain Wallet staff will verify on-site winners by checking trade history and social media posts
- All rewards are subject to verification and may be withheld if conditions are not met

### **Important Information**

- The Crypto.com Onchain Wallet is a standalone, non-custodial product and is not part of the regulated Crypto.com App or Exchange ecosystem.
- The Solana Breakpoint Campaign (“ **Campaign**”) is organised by Crypto.com Onchain Wallet and LI.FI, and is [available in select jurisdictions only](https://help.crypto.com/en/articles/4429907-crypto-com-onchain-wallet-swap-geo-restrictions). Participation is optional and subject to eligibility requirem

tags.impact_reason: Meridian introduces a novel AI-driven investing interface on Solana, potentially improving user onboarding and trading experiences, but it's still early stage.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a Crystalline Prism as the semantic anchor because it perfectly visualizes Meridian's function as an 'intelligent interface.' It takes chaotic, multi-faceted input (natural language, social sentiment) and refracts it into a single, focused, powerful output (institutional capital flow on Solana). I included the diegetic text '$5T' as a holographic data point because the transcript explicitly mentions the '$5 trillion of assets' Solana is poised to manage, representing the massive scale Meridian is targeting.
visual_idea.description: A hyper-realistic render of a complex, geometric prism made of a flawless crystalline material, resting on a dark, brushed metal surface. From the left, a diffuse nebula of chaotic, colorful light particles (representing natural language and market sentiment) flows into the prism. Inside, the light is visibly refracted, organized, and focused, emerging from the right as a single, powerful, coherent beam of Solana-turquoise light that cuts through the dark, atmospheric background. Suspended in the air near the prism, a faint, glowing holographic data projection reads '$5T'. The lighting is dramatic, creating volumetric rays and complex caustic patterns on the surrounding surfaces.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A hyper-realistic render of a complex, geometric prism made of a flawless crystalline material, resting on a dark, brushed metal surface. From the left, a diffuse nebula of chaotic, colorful light particles, representing natural language and market sentiment, flows into the prism. Inside, the light is visibly refracted, organized, and focused, emerging from the right as a single, powerful, coherent beam of Solana-turquoise light that cuts through the dark, atmospheric background. Suspended in the air near the prism, a faint, glowing holographic data projection reads '$5T'. The lighting is dramatic, creating intense volumetric rays and complex caustic patterns on the surrounding surfaces. Composed for a vertical 3:4 aspect ratio, an extreme worm's-eye view makes the prism appear monumental, dominating the central frame, with significant negative space at the top to emphasize height and epic scale. Emphasize ultra-photorealistic rendering, high dynamic range, cinematic contrast, and realistic material rendering for the crystalline prism and brushed metal surface. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering, ultra-photorealistic, cinematic contrast, volumetric lighting.

We see the multi-colored streams of light particles entering from the edge of the frame. The intricate, geometric facets of the crystal are actively refracting and aligning these particles, bending and merging them into a brilliant Solana-turquoise beam that is just beginning to form and intensify. Multi-colored streams of volumetric light particles intensely enter from the edge of the frame, their luminous trails visible in the ambient dust motes. The prism's intricate, hyper-detailed geometric facets, with subtle hints of anodized aluminum-like sharp, clean edges, are actively refracting and aligning these radiant particles. They bend and merge into a brilliant, intensifying Solana-turquoise beam, forming a vibrant conduit of pure energy within the crystal. The focus is exquisitely on the complex process of 'thinking' through light, internal reflection, and refraction, showcasing ultra-detailed microtextures and luminous interactions. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ZBrush, cinematic volumetric lighting.

editorial.headline: Meridian Launches "DeFi-Native" AI Agent to Capture Solana’s Institutional Flow
editorial.standfirst: Former Cumberland quant Benedict Brady unveils Meridian, an intelligent interface designed to replace static wallets with active execution agents. The app integrates natural language trading and real-time social sentiment analysis to capture the next wave of capital.
key_takeaways: Founder Pedigree: Benedict Brady (ex-Cumberland, Ergonia) brings 5+ years of institutional quant experience.
Agentic Workflow: "Text-to-Trade" capabilities allow complex execution (e.g., DCA, basket buying) via natural language.
Data Integration: Proprietary "DeFi Native" agent scrapes Twitter and on-chain data 24/7 for contextual market insights.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The era of the "dumb wallet" is ending. At Solana Breakpoint 2025, **Benedict Brady**, a former quantitative researcher at **Cumberland** and founder of the DeFi trading firm **Ergonia**, introduced **Meridian**, a product that fundamentally reimagines the retail investment interface. While the current standard—exemplified by Phantom or MetaMask—serves as a passive container for assets, Meridian functions as an active, intelligent agent. Brady’s thesis is sharp: as AI interfaces like Cursor revolutionize coding, financial interfaces must evolve from static dashboards to intent-based execution layers.

Meridian’s core value proposition lies in its "DeFi Native" agent. Unlike generic LLMs that hallucinate financial context, Meridian runs a 24/7 scraper across Twitter and on-chain data to contextualize price action. When a user asks about a specific narrative asset (e.g., "the Trump asset" or "WETH"), the agent retrieves real-time social sentiment and liquidity data rather than generic definitions. This bridges the gap between the high-frequency noise of Crypto Twitter and the execution layer, offering users the kind of contextual awareness previously reserved for professional trading desks.

Beyond the AI narrative, the application tackles the most persistent friction point in crypto: onboarding. Brady highlighted that traditional wallet funding—copy-pasting addresses and bridging USDC—remains a massive barrier to the "five trillion dollars" of assets waiting to move on-chain. Meridian integrates direct **debit, credit, and ACH** rails, allowing users to bypass exchanges entirely. Combined with natural language commands like "DCA into Bitcoin," the platform effectively lowers the sophistication barrier for complex on-chain strategies.

This launch signals a broader shift in the Solana ecosystem toward "Internet Capital Markets." By combining institutional-grade data ingestion with a consumer-friendly, natural language interface, Meridian is positioning itself not just as a wallet, but as the primary relationship layer for the next generation of investors. The beta is currently live on the App Store, marking the first tangible step toward an agent-mediated financial future.
